title: Fix data corruption bug
original_text: Fixed data corruption bug in file upload handler. Files were being corrupted during processing due to incorrect encoding. Added proper binary file handling. Implemented file integrity verification with checksums. Added rollback on corruption detection. Added error logging for corrupted files. Added tests for file integrity. Result: no more data corruption.
expected_subject: fix(storage): add file integrity verification to prevent corruption
expected_body_lines: - Implement file integrity verification with checksums
- Add error logging for corrupted files
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(storage): add file integrity verification to prevent corruption"
